Subscriber.title: Subscriber
Subscriber.description: A user who has subscribed to the CPRA newsletter.

email.description: The email address of the subscriber.

subscribedAt.description: The timestamp when the user subscribed.

ContactMessage.title: ContactMessage
ContactMessage.description: A message sent from the contact form.

name.description: The full name of the sender.

email.description: The email address of the sender.

sentAt.description: The timestamp when the message was sent.

/contact_messages/{messageId}.description: Collection of messages sent via the contact form.
